Title: Adjustable Shelf Bracket Hardware - Pair of Rustic Metal Corner Brackets
Description:
Elevate your DIY projects with this set of sturdy, adjustable metal shelf brackets. Designed for simple installation, these brackets provide robust support for shelves, perfect for bathroom vanities, floating wall shelves, or kitchen cabinetry.

  • Universal Fit: Suitable for a variety of wood and composite shelving units.
  • Durable Construction: Made from high-quality, powder-coated metal, ensuring long-lasting support and rust resistance.
  • Easy Installation: Features a simple design that allows for adjustable mounting to fit various spacing requirements.
  • Perfect For: Bathroom remodelers, home DIY enthusiasts, craft projects, and modern farmhouse decor.

    Whether you are building a tiered spice rack or a stylish floating vanity, these brackets offer reliable, industrial-chic support that enhances both function and aesthetic appeal. They are sold as a pair, ensuring symmetry in your design.
